emails.subject: Why your labs are 'normal' but you still feel awful
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you've been told your labs look 'normal' but you're still dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] every single day — you're not imagining it.

Conventional bloodwork checks whether you're in crisis. Functional medicine testing checks whether you're actually thriving.

At Holistic Health Collective in Searcy, AR, Christie Brooks (Functional Medicine RD, 25+ years) and our DNP/APRN team dig into the markers most doctors never order:

- Organic acids & gut permeability markers
- Full thyroid panel (not just TSH)
- Sex hormone + adrenal rhythm testing
- Micronutrient deficiencies
- Inflammatory and metabolic markers

This is why our patients finally get answers — sometimes after years of being dismissed.

We offer cash-pay, transparent pricing with no insurance red tape. Initial visits are 75-90 minutes of real conversation and a real plan.

If you're ready to find out what's actually driving your symptoms, we have new patient openings.

Book your initial consultation: https://holistichealthcollectivesearcy.com/new-patients/

To your healing,
The HHC Team
501-232-7199

*This email is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

emails.subject: The gut-hormone connection nobody told you about
emails.preview: Your gut controls more than digestion
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's something that surprises most of our new patients:

Your gut and your hormones are in constant conversation.

When your gut lining becomes permeable — what's sometimes called 'leaky gut' — inflammatory particles enter the bloodstream and trigger a cascade effect: cortisol spikes, thyroid conversion slows, sex hormones go haywire, and your immune system stays on high alert.

This is why so many people with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] also deal with fatigue, brain fog, weight gain, and mood swings — even when each symptom gets treated separately with no lasting result.

At Holistic Health Collective, our approach starts by mapping YOUR specific cascade:

1. Comprehensive functional testing reveals your personal imbalances
2. Christie Brooks MS RD builds your nutrition and lifestyle protocol
3. Our DNP/APRN team addresses any clinical needs including hormones
4. We support detox pathways with IV therapy, HBOT, or red light when appropriate

This isn't a protocol pulled from a shelf. It's built around your biology.

Want to understand your own gut-hormone connection?

Book a consultation and we'll map it out together: https://holistichealthcollectivesearcy.com/new-patients/

Christie Brooks MS RD & The HHC Team
Searcy, AR | 501-232-7199

*Results vary. This is educational content, not medical advice.

emails.subject: She had the same symptoms for 7 years. Here's what changed.
emails.preview: 7 years of answers in one visit
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

When Sarah first came to Holistic Health Collective, she'd been dealing with bloating, exhaustion, hair loss, and weight gain for seven years. She'd seen six different doctors. Her labs were always 'within range.'

Within her first 90-minute consultation, Christie Brooks ordered a full functional panel — organic acids, comprehensive thyroid, adrenal rhythm, and gut permeability markers. What came back told a complete story: subclinical hypothyroidism, gut dysbiosis, depleted B vitamins, and elevated reverse T3 that conventional ranges don't flag.

Six months later: 22 pounds released, hair growing back, energy returning, and off two prescription medications she'd been on for years.

Sarah's story isn't unusual at HHC. It's what happens when you stop chasing symptoms and start addressing root causes.

Our team — Christie Brooks MS RD, our DNP, and APRN — sees patients across Arkansas for functional medicine, hormone balancing, gut healing, IV therapy, HBOT, and integrative care. Cash-pay, transparent pricing, no prior authorization games.

If [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] has been your 'normal' for too long, it doesn't have to stay that way.

Book your Symptoms to Solutions consultation: https://holistichealthcollectivesearcy.com/new-patients/

To your healing journey,
The Holistic Health Collective Team
Searcy, AR | 501-232-7199

*Individual results vary. Patient story shared with permission and details changed for privacy. Nothing here constitutes medical advice or guarantees specific outcomes.

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — holistichealthcollectivesearcy.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Global Rank | 4,415,407 |
| Keywords Ranked | 63 |
| Monthly Traffic | 63 |
| Traffic Value | $0 |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 5 |
| SERP Features Traffic | 0 |

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: NEARLY INVISIBLE OUTSIDE BRANDED SEARCHES
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
63 total keywords ranked — but almost all are brand name variations. Of 63 keywords:
- Positions 1–3: 2 keywords (both branded)
- Positions 4–10: 3 keywords
- Positions 11–20: 4 keywords
- Positions 21+: 54 keywords

The site generates essentially zero traffic from patients searching for functional medicine, gut health, hormones, or integrative care in Arkansas. Every new patient finding HHC online is searching the practice name directly — meaning zero organic patient acquisition from condition-based or service-based searches.

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
1 keyword triggers an AI Overview in Google search results. Holistic Health Collective is not cited in any AI Overview response — meaning when Google's AI summarizes 'functional medicine in Arkansas' or related queries, this practice does not appear. As AI-generated answers capture more zero-click searches, this invisibility compounds.

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: FUNCTIONAL MEDICINE ARKANSAS CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
This practice has zero ranked keywords for the highest-intent local searches in Arkansas. The entire condition-treatment cluster is uncontested from HHC's domain:

- 'functional medicine Arkansas' [not ranked]
- 'functional medicine Searcy AR' [not ranked]
- 'holistic doctor Searcy Arkansas' [not ranked]
- 'gut health specialist Arkansas' [not ranked]
- 'hormone specialist Arkansas' [not ranked]
- 'integrative medicine Little Rock' [not ranked]
- 'root cause medicine Arkansas' [not ranked]

These are buyer-intent searches by patients ready to book — and HHC's 25-year RD credential + FM training makes it the most qualified practice in the region to rank for them.

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4-10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- 'holistic health collective' [pos 7] — vol 260, KD 8
- 'holistic collective' [pos 9] — vol 70, KD 24
- 'brooks holistic care' [pos 9] — vol 40, KD 23

These are all brand-adjacent. None represent new patient acquisition. Quick wins are limited because no condition or service pages exist to rank.

→ Priority: Push 'holistic health collective' from pos 7 to pos 1-3 with homepage optimization, then build out condition landing pages to capture unbranded searches.

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
| Metric | holistichealthcollectivesearcy.com | holistictn.com |
|---|---|---|
| Total Keywords | 63 | 75 |
| Monthly Traffic | 63 | 21 |
| Traffic Value | $0 | $0 |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 5 | ~8 |

HHC actually edges out its closest competitor in raw traffic — but both are micro-scale. Neither practice has cracked condition-based local SEO. This means whoever builds landing pages for 'functional medicine Arkansas,' 'gut health Searcy,' and 'hormone therapy AR' first will own the market. HHC has first-mover advantage with a superior credentialed team and existing domain.

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────
1. **Build condition landing pages** — Create dedicated pages for 'Gut Health,' 'Hormone Balancing,' 'Thyroid,' and 'Weight Loss' with Searcy, AR geo-targeting. Each page targets 3-5 keywords with 800+ words of clinical content. Target: first-page ranking within 90 days for low-KD local terms (KD 8-24 range).

2. **Claim the 'Functional Medicine Arkansas' cluster** — Homepage title tag and H1 currently optimized only for brand name. Rewrite meta title to include 'Functional Medicine Searcy AR | Christie Brooks RD.' Add structured data (LocalBusiness schema). Target: rank top 5 for 'functional medicine Searcy AR' (est. vol 50-100/mo) within 60 days.

3. **Enter AI Overview citations** — Create an FAQ page answering 'What is functional medicine?', 'How does root cause healing work?', and 'What conditions does a functional medicine RD treat?' with 300-word structured answers. AI Overviews pull from FAQ schema. Target: cited in 1+ AI Overview for Arkansas functional medicine queries within 120 days.
